name: elegy-ai-radar
description: AI release, research, and tooling signal tracking for Elegy.

interface.shortDescription: Track AI releases, research, and tooling signals.
interface.longDescription: Monitor AI release, research, repository, and tooling signals through a bundled CLI. The implementation ships as a proprietary plugin archive while this wrapper provides public Elegy marketplace metadata.
defaultPrompt: Use AI Radar to inspect planned AI signal tracking capabilities.
Plan an AI release digest with AI Radar.
